tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows an elevated HbA1c (6.3%), indicating impaired glucose metabolism or possible diabetes, despite a normal fasting glucose. Renal function (urea, creatinine), electrolytes, and calcium are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation and management of glycemic control. No other significant laboratory abnormalities detected.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provider Organization: KfH-Nierenzentrum am Klinikum Freising
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
